case_title: SILVIO OCAMPO VS. IRINA YUKHFMAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OCAMPO, SILVIO AS TO DEFENDANT YUKHFMAN, IRINA DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, AS TO DEFENDANT YUKHFMAN, IRINA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OCAMPO, SILVIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YUKHFMAN, IRINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 101 ACADIA ST. #1, 2ND FLOOR, S.F. CA. 94131, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
